nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT s.id, s.urn, s.exam_id, s.course_id, s.student_id, s.bundle_id, s.s3_key, s.dek_id, s.scan_metadata, s.lifecycle_status, s.scan_status, s.evaluation_status, s.block_status, sd.device_name, au.code AS campus_code, au.name AS campus_name
FROM   answer_script AS s
JOIN   script_assignment AS sa ON sa.script_id = s.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   faculty_cache AS fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   academic_unit_closure AS ac ON ac.descendant_id = au.id
JOIN   scanner_device AS sd ON sd.id = sa.device_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache AS esc ON esc.exam_id = s.exam_id
WHERE  sd.campus_id != esc.campus_id
ORDER  BY s.exam_date DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (script_assignment, scanner_device, answer_script). You must qualify it with a table alias.
